app.title: GitHub Stacked PRs
app.author: ezekg
app.description: GitHub Stacked PRs allows users to review pull requests in a more organized way.
proposed_tests: Create a test repository and open a pull request
Verify that the comments section is working correctly
Check if the issue tracker is integrated properly
